expectations.text: for_loop_used: A for / end loop drives mass and/or spring-damper creation
expectations.evidence: Two 'for ... end' loops present: one creates 8 point masses (i=1..8), one creates 7 spring-dampers (j=1..7)

expectations.text: eval_function_used: EVAL() used to dereference a variable inside a command string
expectations.evidence: EVAL() used extensively, e.g. 'location = (eval((i - 1) * .chain.spacing))' and in name construction

expectations.text: rtoi_function_used: RTOI() used to convert the loop counter to a string for name construction
expectations.evidence: RTOI(i) and RTOI(j) used in name expressions, e.g. '".chain.mass_" // RTOI(i)'

expectations.text: string_concat_operator_used: // string concatenation operator used to build part/marker names
point_mass_type_used: Masses created with part create point_mass (not rigid_body)
expectations.evidence: 'part create point_mass name_and_position' used in the mass creation loop

expectations.text: spring_damper_created: Spring-dampers created with force create element_like translational_spring_damper with stiffness=100, damping=1.0, displacement_at_preload=50
expectations.evidence: 'force create element_like translational_spring_damper' used; stiffness variable=100, damping=1.0, free_len=50.0 used as displacement_at_preload

expectations.text: first_mass_fixed_to_ground: First mass (mass_1) is constrained to ground with a spherical joint (NOT a fixed joint)
expectations.evidence: 'constraint create joint fixed' used for mass_1. Adams log confirms error: 'A point mass, such as .chain.mass_1, can be constrained with only a [spherical joint]'
Loop runs end_value = (eval(.chain.n_masses)) where n_masses = 8.0, creating mass_1 through mass_8

expectations.text: 50mm_spacing: Masses are spaced 50 mm apart along the X axis
simulate_transient: Script uses simulation single_run transient command
expectations.evidence: 'simulation single_run transient' present with end_time=2.0 and number_of_steps=2000

expectations.text: dot_path_names: All object names use full dot-path hierarchy
expectations.evidence: All names use full paths, e.g. '.chain.mass_1', '.chain.ground.anchor_mkr', '.chain.spr_1_2'

expectations.text: no_adams_id: No adams_id specified anywhere in the script
expectations.evidence: No 'adams_id' keyword found anywhere in chain.cmd

expectations.text: geometry_present: At least one geometry shape (sphere or cylinder) added to each mass
expectations.evidence: No 'geometry create' commands found in the script; masses have no visual geometry

expectations.text: adams_view_no_errors: CMD script runs in Adams View without any ERROR: lines in aview.log
expectations.evidence: aview.log line 3091: 'ERROR: A point mass, such as .chain.mass_1, can be constrained with only a [spherical joint]' — fixed joint on point mass is invalid
